title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
We at LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions:
LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Electronics India Ventures Solutions!
